---
title: "Contact"
---

**Dr Mesfin Genie**  
Senior Lecturer in Health Economics  
Newcastle Business School  
The University of Newcastle, Australia

Email: [mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au](mailto:mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au)  
University profile: <https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie>  
Google Scholar: <https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=v2SXM_kAAAAJ&hl=en>  
ORCID: <https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1744-4666>
